title: createMemo
description: Creates a cached derived value. Use when computing a value from other signals. Only recomputes when dependencies change.
signature: createMemo<T>(fn: (prev: T | undefined) => T, value?: T, options?: MemoOptions<T>): Accessor<T>
returns_body: An Accessor<T> that returns the memoized value. Acts as both a signal reader (trackable) and a computation (auto-updates).
